theme_and_archetype.mood: Serenidade, Confiança, Exclusividade, Elegância, Cuidado humano, Tecnologia discreta
theme_and_archetype.inspiration: Private luxury clinics, premium spas, boutique hotels, minimalist contemporary architecture

colors.primary_description: Verde profundo elegante. Use for primary CTAs, key highlighting, and deep-toned section backgrounds.
colors.secondary_description: Branco puro. Dominant background color to provide immense whitespace and breathable layout.
colors.text_primary_description: Preto suave. Use for all main headings and body text to maintain sharp contrast and readability.
colors.details_description: Cinza prata muito subtil. Use for subtle borders (1px solid), minimal dividers, and understated structural elements.

typography.heading_strategy: Sophisticated, distinctive editorial serif. Gives a premium, high-end editorial feel.
typography.body_strategy: Clean, geometric sans-serif that pairs beautifully with editorial serifs without competing.

scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tight leading-none

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Ultra minimalist, editorial, lots of whitespace. Treat the screen like a high-end magazine spread.
layout_and_spacing.border_strategy: Use 1px solid #C7C7C7 for structural separation instead of drop shadows. No heavy boxes.

motion_and_interaction.scrolling: Smooth scrolling using Lenis is MANDATORY to convey a premium, unhurried feel.
motion_and_interaction.entrance: Subtle, slow fade-ins and slight vertical translates (y: 20) on scroll using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Elegant and deliberate. For treatment cards: hover reveals descriptions with smooth opacity/height transitions. Image scales slightly (1.05) within hidden overflow containers.

Header.description: Sticky header with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80). Minimalist layout.
Header.elements: Logo text ('Origem') in Cormorant Garamond. Clean navigation links. Primary CTA ('Marcar Avaliação') in #214A3B.

Hero.layout: Full viewport height (min-h-screen). Large clinic interior photo as background with a subtle overlay (e.g., bg-black/20) to ensure text readability without dulling the image.

copy.headline: O cuidado dentário deve ser tão confortável quanto o resultado.
copy.subheadline: Na Origem Dental Clinic, cada detalhe foi pensado para que a sua experiência seja tranquila, personalizada e excecional.

Hero.styling: Headline centered or starkly left-aligned. High-end editorial typography.

Atmosfera.layout: Side-by-side or asymmetrical grid (Tetris grid). Large, high-quality imagery of the space.
Atmosfera.styling: Whitespace heavy. Text blocks should have massive padding to feel detached and floating like in an art gallery.

Filosofia.layout: Photo and text side-by-side. Consider a background shift to the primary color (#214A3B) with white text to create pacing and depth.
Filosofia.styling: Large body text for the philosophy statement. High contrast.

Tratamentos.layout: Grid of premium cards (Implantes, Ortodontia, Estética Dentária, Reabilitação Oral).
Tratamentos.styling: Cards should have a 1px border (#C7C7C7). NO shadows. On hover, a description smoothly reveals from the bottom or fades in. Very architectural and crisp.

Jornada_do_Paciente.layout: 5-step visual journey. Can be a vertical timeline using a delicate 1px line (#C7C7C7) connecting nodes, or a horizontal scrollable area.
Jornada_do_Paciente.styling: Nodes should be subtle. Typography must lead the visual hierarchy.

Depoimentos.layout: Sophisticated slider or masonry. NO heavy boxes. NO giant yellow stars.
Depoimentos.styling: Text-driven. Use a large, elegant quotation mark. Author name in uppercase serif.

Chamada_Final.layout: Emotional final CTA section. Extremely minimal. Perhaps just a serene background image with text.
Chamada_Final.copy: Functional appointment/contact form integrated elegantly or a strong button.

Footer.styling: Phone, WhatsApp, Address, Socials clearly laid out. Dark (#1A1A1A) or primary (#214A3B) background with light text, massive top and bottom padding.

image_urls.description: Modern white reception area with curved lines and glass partitions. Perfect for hero or atmosphere.
Woman sitting in a modern waiting room reading. Conveys serenity.
Clean, modern medical examination room. Represents clinical excellence in a minimal space.
Close-up of a serene woman with a beautiful, natural smile. Humanizes the clinic.
Black and white or muted image of a smiling woman, great for philosophy or patient stories.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the requested exact hex codes for the color palette.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings and 'Outfit' for body text. Include these from Google Fonts.
Enforce ultra-minimalist layout: do NOT use standard drop shadows (shadow-md, etc.) on cards. Use 1px borders of #C7C7C7 and whitespace for separation.
Ensure all interactive elements and key informational elements have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-primary-cta').
Implement Lenis for smooth scrolling and Framer Motion for subtle entry animations.
The Tratamentos cards MUST feature a hover reveal for the descriptions to maintain a clean initial view.
Avoid using the 'card' component from shadcn if it enforces shadows/rounded corners that conflict with this architectural, flat, 1px-border aesthetic. Build custom structural divs instead.
Use standard raw HTML and Tailwind for complex, overlapping, or highly specific editorial layouts (e.g., Hero, Atmosfera).
Only use Lucide-react or Phosphor icons, kept minimal and thin (stroke-width 1 or 1.5).
